task_completion.description: Verify the junior_soc_analyst role is created and inherits only from the user role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Splunk 'Roles' page or role creation form showing the role name 'junior_soc_analyst' with inheritance explicitly set to 'user' (and not 'admin' or 'power').

task_completion.description: Verify the search jobs quota for the junior_soc_analyst role is set to 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Splunk role configuration page (Resources tab or similar) for 'junior_soc_analyst' showing the standard search jobs limit/quota set to 3.

task_completion.description: Verify the junior_soc_analyst role is restricted to only the security_logs and web_logs indexes for both allowed and default searches.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Splunk role configuration page (Indexes tab) showing 'security_logs' and 'web_logs' selected for both 'Included' and 'Default', and '*' or 'main' NOT selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the user jsmith is created with the full name Jordan Smith.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Splunk 'Users' list or user creation form showing username 'jsmith' and Full Name 'Jordan Smith'.

task_completion.description: Verify the user jsmith is assigned only the junior_soc_analyst role and the default app is set to search.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Splunk user configuration page for 'jsmith' showing the assigned role is exactly 'junior_soc_analyst' and the Default App dropdown is set to 'search'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Splunk Web UI to create the role and user.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Splunk Web interface (Settings > Roles, Settings > Users) rather than a terminal window executing CLI commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Splunk instance in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a Splunk URL (e.g., localhost:8000) and the genuine Splunk UI is visible, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the UI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing scripts like 'splunk add user' or curl commands to the Splunk REST API.
